name: req-skill
description: Interactive development-requirements capture. /req [what] interviews the requester and writes a requirements document; /req-brainstorm [request] runs active-proposal brainstorming before producing the same artifact; /req-lite [request] auto-drafts a requirements doc for lightweight maintenance requests with minimal interview; /req-setup initializes a per-product context workspace at docs/req-skill/ that /req reads, grows, and reconciles.
